summary: Vendor Image Upload Flow (Phase 1) - E2E Testing Complete. Backend: 20/21 tests passed (1 validation bug). Frontend: All UI elements verified for vendor product upload and admin product approvals.

minor.issue: Backend accepts negative allocated_quantity values (-10 stored instead of being rejected or normalized to 0)

action_items: Add validation in backend to reject or normalize negative allocated_quantity values in POST /api/vendor/products/upload
critical_code_review_comments: VendorProductUploadPage.jsx: File upload zone correctly implemented with drag-and-drop, calls POST /api/files/upload, stores storage_path
VendorProductUploadPage.jsx: allocated_quantity field present in supply section with proper validation on frontend (parseInt, >= 0 check)
AdminProductApprovalPage.jsx: Drawer-based review working with image gallery navigation (arrows + thumbnails)
AdminProductApprovalPage.jsx: Approve/Reject buttons inside drawer working, bulk actions visible when items selected
admin_vendor_submission_routes.py: Properly normalizes nested product.images to gallery_images for admin display
product_upload_service.py: build_submission_doc correctly stores gallery_images at top level and allocated_quantity
file_routes.py: POST /api/files/upload returns storage_path like 'konekt/products/{uuid}.png', GET /api/files/serve/{path} serves images correctly
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Created test products: TEST_NoImage_Product, TEST_SingleImage_Product, TEST_Gallery_Product, TEST_Bulk_Product_1, TEST_Bulk_Product_2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Image Upload Flow Phase 1 verified. File upload via POST /api/files/upload works (returns storage_path). Vendor product upload via POST /api/vendor/products/upload accepts images array with storage paths. Admin product approvals at /admin/product-approvals shows submissions with images in table and drawer. Drawer has image gallery with navigation arrows and thumbnails. Approve/Reject buttons work. Bulk approve/reject work. One minor bug: backend accepts negative allocated_quantity. Partner login uses POST /api/partner-auth/login (returns access_token). Admin login uses POST /api/auth/login.

elements_verified: Image dropzone (data-testid='image-dropzone') - file upload zone, not text URL inputs
File input (data-testid='image-file-input') - accepts JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP

tests_passed: Product without images - creates submission with empty gallery_images
Product with single image - sets image_url to first image
Product with multiple images (3+) - sets image_url and gallery_images correctly
allocated_quantity stored at top level and in supply object
tests_failed: Negative allocated_quantity accepted instead of rejected

elements_verified: Submissions table with images, vendor, cost, QTY, status, date columns
Bulk approve/reject buttons (appear when items selected)
Drawer shows image gallery with navigation arrows and thumbnails
Reject button in drawer opens modal
Reject modal with notes input and confirm button

endpoints_tested: GET /api/admin/vendor-submissions - returns normalized list with gallery_images
POST /api/admin/vendor-submissions/{id}/approve - creates catalog product with gallery_images and allocated_quantity
